storyboard.content: I have severe crushing chest pain that has been going on for the past 30 minutes and it started while I was just sitting at rest.
The pain is radiating down my left arm and up into my jaw.
I am very short of breath.
I am breaking out in a cold sweat.
The chest pain is a 9 out of 10. I took aspirin but it has not helped at all. I feel like something is seriously wrong.
The pain came on suddenly while I was at rest 30 minutes ago and has not let up.
I am a 55-year-old man. I have high blood pressure and high cholesterol, and I am a smoker.
